title: Nominal vs Real Head
description: The President is the De Jure (nominal) executive head under Article 53, while the Prime Minister is the De Facto (real) executive head.

title: Bicameral Parliament
description: Article 79 states Parliament consists of the President, the Council of States (Rajya Sabha), and the House of the People (Lok Sabha).

title: Money Bill Authority
description: The Speaker of the Lok Sabha has sole authority to decide whether a bill is a Money Bill or not (Article 110), and their decision is final.

title: Largest Committee
description: The Estimates Committee is the largest Parliamentary Committee with 30 members, all exclusively drawn from the Lok Sabha.
